timing_policy.method: Generate one natural Brazilian Portuguese utterance per segment, place it at the segment start, and preserve silence between segments.
fit_order: Tighten the Brazilian Portuguese wording without changing meaning.
Regenerate with pronunciation or punctuation adjustments.
Apply no more than 10 percent time compression when editorial changes cannot solve the overrun.
do_not: Synthesize each original VTT cue as a separate utterance.
Move narration across a visual transition without reviewing the picture.
Map the original English audio stream into the localized video.

audio_mix.method: The source audio stream will not be mapped. The aligned Brazilian Portuguese voice-only master will be mixed over viacheslavstarostin-background-backsound-music-educational-364858.mp3, normalized to -27 LUFS. Music fades in, sidechain-ducks beneath narration, restores between phrases, and fades over the final four seconds.
audio_mix.review_warning: Confirm narration level, pronunciation, music balance, ducking transitions, and the final fade.

editorial_notes: Corrected clear AI-caption recognition errors before Brazilian Portuguese translation.
Preserved official OCP product, program, and organization names in English where required.

segments.english: We have covered the history, rack architecture, and cooling specifications. Now it is time to map your deployment journey.
segments.portuguese: Abordamos a história, a arquitetura do rack e as especificações de resfriamento. Agora é hora de mapear sua jornada de implantação.

segments.english: That journey begins with a rigorous facility assessment. Before buying any hardware, evaluate your site against critical readiness factors.
segments.portuguese: Essa jornada começa com uma avaliação rigorosa da instalação. Antes de comprar hardware, verifique os fatores críticos de prontidão.

segments.english: First, power density: can the facility support the required load?
segments.portuguese: Primeiro, densidade de potência: a instalação pode suportar a carga necessária?

segments.english: Second, thermal capacity: are you prepared to route liquid-cooling manifolds?
segments.portuguese: Segundo: capacidade térmica. Há suporte para coletores de refrigeração líquida?

segments.english: Third, physical weight: fully populated ORv3 racks are extremely heavy, so structural floors must safely support the load.
segments.portuguese: Terceiro, peso físico: os racks ORv3 totalmente preenchidos são extremamente pesados, portanto, os pisos estruturais devem suportar a carga com segurança.

segments.english: Once the facility is cleared, the next stop is the OCP Marketplace, the central hub for procuring verified hardware.
segments.portuguese: Quando a instalação for aprovada, a próxima parada será o OCP Marketplace, o principal ponto para adquirir hardware verificado.

segments.english: Look for the OCP Accepted badge. These officially recognized products adhere to designs published in the OCP database.
segments.portuguese: Procure o selo OCP Accepted. Esses produtos oficialmente reconhecidos seguem projetos publicados no banco de dados do OCP.

segments.english: OCP Accepted hardware provides proven efficiency, whether you are building a new data center or replacing legacy 19-inch racks.
segments.portuguese: O hardware OCP Accepted oferece eficiência comprovada, esteja você construindo um novo data center ou substituindo racks legados de 19 polegadas.

segments.english: But what if the current facility fails the assessment? If the floors cannot support the weight or the site lacks cooling infrastructure, you do not have to abandon the transition.
segments.portuguese: Mas e se a instalação atual falhar na avaliação? Se os pisos não suportarem o peso ou se o local não tiver infraestrutura de refrigeração, não será necessário abandonar a transição.

segments.english: You can move operations to an OCP Ready colocation facility. These rigorously audited third-party sites are purpose-built to house OCP hardware.
segments.portuguese: Você pode transferir as operações para uma instalação de colocation OCP Ready. Essas instalações terceirizadas passam por auditorias rigorosas e foram projetadas para receber hardware OCP.

segments.english: Moving to open infrastructure is a major undertaking, but you do not have to do it alone. You are part of the community and have access to a rich ecosystem.
segments.portuguese: Mudar para uma infraestrutura aberta é uma tarefa importante, mas você não precisa fazer isso sozinho. Você faz parte da comunidade e tem acesso a um rico ecossistema.

segments.english: The OCP Marketplace includes certified OCP Solution Providers: professional services firms and system integrators trained to assess readiness, design architecture, and deploy hardware for you.
segments.portuguese: O OCP Marketplace inclui provedores de soluções OCP certificados: empresas de serviços profissionais e integradores de sistemas treinados para avaliar a prontidão, projetar arquitetura e implantar hardware para você.

segments.english: The community has already done the heavy engineering. Your next step is to see it for yourself.
segments.portuguese: A comunidade já realizou o trabalho mais complexo de engenharia. Seu próximo passo é conhecer os resultados.

segments.english: Browse the digital OCP Marketplace to find hardware and Solution Providers, or visit a physical OCP Experience Center to see the technology operating in person.
segments.portuguese: Navegue no OCP Marketplace digital para encontrar fornecedores de hardware e soluções ou visite um Centro de Experiência OCP físico para ver a tecnologia operando pessoalmente.

segments.english: Welcome to the Open Compute ecosystem.

language_policy.dialect: Natural Brazilian Portuguese for a professional technical audience.
language_policy.acronyms: Use IA in spoken Portuguese; retain OCP and product acronyms where technically appropriate.
language_policy.numbers: Preserve every source year, percentage, voltage, and monetary value exactly.
language_policy.tone: Warm, authoritative, concise, and natural for spoken Brazilian Portuguese.
